character.bio: A kindhearted defender of nature, Blanka has become an adventure tour guide, confident his intimate knowledge of the jungle will serve as a springboard to fame—and a comfortable life for his beloved mother.

blanka_standing_medium_kick_m.note: * 3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

blanka_standing_heavy_punch_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing position

blanka_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: Forces a juggle state when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter on a mid-air opponentForces the opponent into a standing position

blanka_crouching_medium_kick_m.note: *2 frames of recovery added when the attack is blocked or misses

blanka_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Forces a blowback knockdown when the attack lands as a Counter or Punish CounterForces the opponent into a standing position

blanka_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

blanka_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

blanka_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

blanka_neutral_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

blanka_rock_crusher_m.note: *Second attack becomes an overhead only if the first attack whiffs

blanka_double_knee_bombs_m.note: Blowback knockdown when the first attack hits a mid-air opponentForces the opponent into a standing position

blanka_wild_nail_h.note: * Can transition to Coward Crouch between frames 33 - 34Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a ground bound if the attack hits a mid-air opponent

blanka_amazon_river_run_h.note: Forces a Hard Knockdown on Punish Counter

blanka_coward_crouch.note: Hold down on the stick during the move to continue the technique for 48 more framesDuring the crouch, press up on the stick to cancel the techniqueCan transition to Surprise Forward Hop or Surprise Backward Hop from frames 18 - 111 (longest time)

blanka_raid_jump.note: Considered airborne from frames 9 - 43Can be canceled from mid-air normal attacks or special moves from frames 15 - 43

blanka_surprise_forward_hop.note: Can be canceled into any special-canceable normal or unique attack

blanka_surprise_back_hop.note: Considered airborne from frames 11 - 21Can be canceled into any special-canceable normal or unique attack

blanka_electric_thunder.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
blanka_electric_thunder.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) ↓↙← + P
blanka_electric_thunder.note: Hold down the button to continue that attack

blanka_lightning_beast_electric_thunder.note: Hold down the button to continue that attack

blanka_od_electric_thunder.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
blanka_od_electric_thunder.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) ↓↙← + P
blanka_od_electric_thunder.note: Hold down the button to continue that attack

blanka_lightning_beast_od_electric_thund.note: Hold down the button to continue that attack

blanka_lightning_beast_l_rolling_attack_.note: Considered airborne from frames 10 - 23Consumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerCan transition to Rolling Cannon on hit or block

blanka_m_rolling_attack_m.note: Considered airborne from frames 12 - 23Juggle state time is extended when attack hits for a Punish Counter.Can cancel into Level 3 Super Art until active frame 11

blanka_lightning_beast_m_rolling_attack_.note: Considered airborne from frames 12 - 23Consumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerJuggle state time is extended when attack hits for a Punish Counter.Can transition to Rolling Cannon on hit or block

blanka_lightning_beast_h_rolling_attack_.note: Considered airborne from frames 20 - 42Consumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerJuggle state time is extended when attack hits for a Punish Counter.Can transition to Rolling Cannon on hit or block

blanka_od_rolling_attack.note: Considered airborne from frames 18 - 41Can cancel into Level 3 Super Art until active frame 2

blanka_lightning_beast_od_rolling_attack.note: Considered airborne from frames 18 - 40Consumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerCan transition to Rolling Cannon on hit or block

blanka_l_vertical_rolling_attack_l.note: Considered airborne from frames 6 - 57Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 8 - 26

blanka_lightning_beast_l_vertical_rollin.note: Consumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerCan transition to Rolling Cannon on hit or blockConsidered airborne from frames 6 - 57Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 8 - 26

blanka_m_vertical_rolling_attack_m.note: Considered airborne from frames 6 - 57Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 8 - 26

blanka_h_vertical_rolling_attack_h.note: Considered airborne from frames 6 - 57Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 8 - 26

blanka_lightning_beast_h_vertical_rollin.note: Consumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerCan transition to Rolling Cannon on hit or blockConsidered airborne from frames 6 - 57Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 8 - 26

blanka_od_vertical_rolling_attack.note: Considered airborne from frames 4 - 53Completely invincible to attacks from frames 1 - 10

blanka_lightning_beast_od_vertical_rolli.note: Consumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerCan transition to Rolling Cannon on hit or blockConsidered airborne from frames 4 - 53Completely invincible to attacks from frames 1 - 10

blanka_lightning_beast_l_backstep_rollin.note: Consumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerCan transition to Rolling Cannon on hit or block

blanka_lightning_beast_m_backstep_rollin.note: Consumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerCan transition to Rolling Cannon on hit or block

blanka_lightning_beast_h_backstep_rollin.note: Consumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerCan transition to Rolling Cannon on hit or block

blanka_od_backstep_rolling_attack.note: First attack produces a juggle state knockdownCan be canceled into Level 2 or 3 Super Art until the 3rd active frame of the first attack

blanka_lightning_beast_od_backstep_rolli.note: First attack produces a juggle state knockdownConsumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerCan transition to Rolling Cannon when the rotating part hits or is blocked

blanka_lightning_beast_l_aerial_rolling_.note: Consumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerCan transition to Rolling Cannon on hit or blockHas cross-up attack properties

blanka_lightning_beast_m_aerial_rolling_.note: Consumes 100 of the Super Art 2 timerCan transition to Rolling Cannon on hit or blockHas cross-up attack properties

blanka_blanka_chan_bomb.note: Disappears 1000 frames after landing on the groundWorks as a projectile attack when activated by any special moves that produces electricity or comes in contact with a Super Art until the 1000th frameThe trajectory of the thrown doll changes if it touches the edge of the screen

blanka_blanka_chan_bomb_activated.note: Start up value is upon being activated

blanka_od_blanka_chan_bomb_activated.note: Start up value is upon being activated

blanka_rolling_cannon.level: (During Lightning Beast)(When performing a rolling-type special move, press any direction)
blanka_rolling_cannon.note: Can transition into any Rolling-style attack a maximum of 3 times

blanka_sa1_shout_of_earth.note: Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 9Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

blanka_lightning_beast_sa1_shout_of_eart.note: Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 9Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

blanka_sa2_lightning_beast.note: Super Art 2 timer is set to 1500Changes the properties of special moves except for Wild Hunt while activeAllows any Rolling-type attack to cancel into Rolling Cannon while activeAllows the following attacks to be cancel into without any directional charge- Rolling Attack- Vertical Rolling Attack- Aerial Rolling Attack

blanka_sa3_ground_shave_cannonball.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
blanka_sa3_ground_shave_cannonball.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
blanka_sa3_ground_shave_cannonball.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 12Considered airborne from frames 2 - 12Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

blanka_ca_ground_shave_cannonball.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
blanka_ca_ground_shave_cannonball.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
blanka_ca_ground_shave_cannonball.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 12Considered airborne from frames 2 - 12Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

blanka_wild_fang.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

blanka_jungle_flip.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

blanka_wild_bites.input: (During a jump) (When near opponent) LP + LK
blanka_wild_bites.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

blanka_backward_dash.note: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

blanka_drive_impact_wild_scratch.note: Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallProperties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, or after the Super Armor absorbs a hit:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

blanka_drive_reversal_block.displayName: Drive Reversal (while blocking): Quick Rolling Attack
blanka_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
blanka_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
blanka_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

blanka_drive_reversal_wakeup.displayName: Drive Reversal (while recovering): Quick Rolling Attack
blanka_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

blanka_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
blanka_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
blanka_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

blanka_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

blanka_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

blanka_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

blanka_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
blanka_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
blanka_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
